experience.description: Led UI rewrites and optimized web performance to 95+ Lighthouse scores. Implemented CI/CD pipelines with SonarQube and improved user engagement by 25% through UI/UX enhancements.
achievements: Improved user engagement by 25% through UI/UX enhancements
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software on time

experience.description: Built custom components with Elementor plugin for clients around the world. Achieved a client satisfaction rating of 4.8/5 and successfully delivered 15+ client projects.
Assisted in the development of new features for web applications. Gained experience with agile methodologies and version control systems while working effectively in a remote team environment.
achievements: Contributed to the development of a new user authentication module
Participated in daily stand-ups and sprint reviews
Learned to work effectively in a remote team environment

experience.description: Worked on various internal tools and client projects, gaining exposure to different tech stacks. Focused on writing clean, maintainable code and participating in code reviews.
achievements: Developed a new internal dashboard for tracking project progress
Assisted in migrating legacy systems to modern frameworks
Contributed to improving code quality through rigorous testing
